title: 2026 Evening of Sunshine
description:
Step into the rhythm and romance of Havana Nights at Sunshine on a Ranney Day’s Evening of Sunshine Annual Gala. Join us on Saturday, August 22, 2026, at 6:00 PM at You42 Studios in Roswell for an unforgettable evening where vibrant culture meets a mission to support transformational home renovations for children with special needs. Embrace the spirit of the evening by dressing in festive cocktail attire inspired by Havana's colors and flair—think bright hues, tropical prints, and elegant summer styles.

As the sounds of the COT Latin Band fill the room and dynamic dancers bring the spirit of Cuba to life, you’ll be swept into a celebration full of energy, color, and joy. From the lively atmosphere to the immersive experience, every moment is designed to inspire connection and celebration.

But the true heart and purpose of this evening is to raise funds to transform the lives of children with special needs by renovating their homes—creating safe, accessible, and life-changing spaces tailored to each child’s unique challenges. From wheelchair-accessible bathrooms to sensory-friendly bedrooms and therapy spaces, these renovations provide not just functionality, but dignity, independence, and hope for entire families.

Throughout the evening, you’ll have the opportunity to meet some of the incredible children whose lives have already been transformed through SOARD home makeovers, as well as those who are about to receive one, a powerful reminder of the impact your support makes.

Guests will also take part in an exciting live and silent auction, designed to raise funds that directly fuel these critical home transformations. Highlights from this year's auction include a luxury week getaway to 30A, VIP tickets to Zach Brown Band at the Las Vegas Sphere, a fly fishing experience, and a fun smashburger party by the famous Nielsen brothers. 

This is more than a gala, it’s a chance to be part of something deeply meaningful. A chance to turn compassion into action. A chance to give families the comfort and support they deserve. If you are unable to join us in person, you can still make a difference by donating or participating remotely. Visit our website to learn how you can contribute and help bring life-changing renovations to even more children and families.

Join us for a night of passion, purpose, and impact. Every moment of Havana Nights directly brings comfort, hope, and transformation to families who need it most. Your participation helps build a brighter, safer future and ensures children with special needs receive the support they deserve.
